flags.label: Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Paine College are 30% below the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($33.3k vs $47.3k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Paine College fell 15% between 2021 and 2024 (63.2% → 53.6%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 8 pp at Paine College vs the 2003–2007 baseline (21.7% vs 29.8%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Paine College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (13.0% → 0.0%).
